sourcesContent:
function PlayerCard({ player }) { return (

{player.name}

{player.role}

Team: {player.team}

Matches: {player.matches || 0}
Runs: {player.runs || 0}
Wickets: {player.wickets || 0}
Batting Avg: {player.battingAvg || 0}
Strike Rate: {player.strikeRate || 0}
Economy: {player.bowlingEcon || 0}
HS: {player.highScore || 0}
Best: {player.bestBowling || "0/0"}
); } export default PlayerCard;
